title: PRD: Decision-First Refactor for PM Overview Dashboard
description: Refactor the Legacy Overview (Today) page to prioritize honest, decision-first context. The page must clearly distinguish actionable setups from near-misses and immediately communicate why non-actionable setups failed, removing misleading optimism and duplicate/missing-data padding.

stories.title: Decision-First Hierarchy & Top Idea Slots
stories.description: Reorient the layout to be 'decision-first' rather than 'ranking-first'. PMs need to know immediately the absolute best buy, the best near-miss, and what to avoid without scrolling through mediocre setups.
acceptance_criteria: Add a 'Best Actionable Now' prominently above the opportunity cards
Explicitly show 'No buy-now candidate' if none exist
Add a 'Best Near-Miss / Closest to Action' card highlighting what is needed to upgrade it
Add an 'Avoid Now' or 'Key Blockers Summary' panel before the general ranked list

stories.title: Honest Framing & Confidence Clarity
stories.description: Eliminate contradictions between top-line optimism and card-level mediocrity. The framing must be brutally honest about the system's readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Replace overly bullish headers (e.g. 'Strong opportunity day') with honest assessments matching the actual card quality
Explain why confidence caps exist (e.g. 'weak thesis, acceptable timing')
Add a visible 'Why no trades today' blocker panel when applicable
Ensure top-line summary stats regarding high-scoring setups accurately reflect the visible cards

stories.title: Data Quality: Deduplication, R:R, & Noise Reduction
stories.description: Clean up the data presentation to ensure every visible element adds trust. Duplicate ideas and broken data (like missing R:R) destroy PM confidence and must be aggregated or hidden.
acceptance_criteria: Deduplicate similar names (e.g. multiple CSCO cards) into a single master idea with variant notes
Filter out or clearly gracefully handle cards with missing or unusable R:R ('—') from the top ranks
Demote or remove the 0% initial benchmark alpha strip to reduce noise
